scripts.install:all: pnpm install && cd backend && uv sync
scripts.infra:up: docker compose -f infra/docker-compose.yml up -d db redis
scripts.db:add-user: PYTHONPATH=. uv run --project backend python scripts/add_user.py
scripts.mobile:build:preview: pnpm --filter mobile exec eas build --profile preview --platform android
scripts.mobile:update:preview: pnpm --filter mobile exec eas update --branch preview
scripts.api:dev: pnpm infra:up && docker compose -f infra/docker-compose.yml up api
scripts.api:run: pnpm infra:up && docker compose -f infra/docker-compose.yml up -d api
